reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención, voy porque es YPF.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very slow, I'm only going because it's YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbjltTTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísimo!!!!!
Mala predisposición de la gente que atiende!!!
Te cobran el combustible lo del bar y lo del hospedaje todo en el mismo lugar!!
Para averiguar del hospedaje tuve que esperar 1/2 hora para quede mal modo me dijeran que no tenían lugar para cuatro y no me podían dar dos habitaciones de 3 aunque las pagara!!
Increíble!!!
El ACA cada ves peor!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible!!!!!
The staff were incredibly unhelpful!!!
They charge you for fuel, the bar, and lodging all in the same place!!
To inquire about lodging, I had to wait half an hour only to be rudely told they didn't have room for four and couldn't give me two rooms for three even if I paid for them!!
Unbelievable!!!
The ACA is getting worse and worse!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJei1hMkZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Para cargar combustible y seguir, la atencion pesima, y ni hablar del Full, nunca anda el posnet, no tienen comida y no te preparan

(Translated by Google)
To refuel and continue, the service is terrible, and don't even get me started on the Full station; the card reader never works, they don't have food, and they don't prepare anything for you.
